Name: TENTATIVE_PLAYER_PARAM_ST
Description: Stay Param. Handles various elements relating to the player state.

Fields.Name: Player Automatic Foot Effect SFX Identifier
Fields.Description: Identifier used for foot effect SFX IDs. Corresponds to the ZZZ portion of the XYYZZZ SFX ID.

Fields.Name: Sniping Mode Player Hide Fade Time
Fields.Description: Time, in seconds, taken to fade the player out when entering precision aiming mode.

Fields.Name: Player Poise Recovery Time Correction
Fields.Description: Correction value used when calculating the player's poise recovery time.

Fields.Name: Hollowing Threshold
Fields.Description: If the player's Hollowing value is at or above this threshold when they die, they become Hollow.

Fields.Name: Reserved
Fields.Description: Reserved. Purpose unknown.

Fields.Name: Seed of a Giant Tree Drop Maximum Chance When Invaded
Fields.Description: Maximum probability of obtaining a Seed of a Giant Tree after being invaded.

Fields.Name: Dropped Item Pickup Animation ID
Fields.Description: Animation ID played when picking up a dropped item.

Fields.Name: Chest Item Pickup Animation ID
Fields.Description: Animation ID played when obtaining an item from a treasure chest. Appears to be unused.

Fields.Name: Lord of Cinder Special Effect 1
Fields.Description: Special effect applied when entering the Lord of Cinder state. Applied only once upon initial activation.

Fields.Name: Lord of Cinder Special Effect 2
Fields.Description: Special effect applied when entering the Lord of Cinder state. Applied only once upon initial activation.

Fields.Name: Lord of Cinder Special Effect 3
Fields.Description: Special effect applied when entering the Lord of Cinder state. Applied only once upon initial activation.

Fields.Name: Lord of Cinder Special Effect 4
Fields.Description: Special effect applied when entering the Lord of Cinder state. Applied only once upon initial activation.

Fields.Name: Lord of Cinder Special Effect 5
Fields.Description: Special effect applied when entering the Lord of Cinder state. Applied only once upon initial activation.

Fields.Name: Insufficient Stats Base Attack Power Reduction
Fields.Description: Reduction applied to base attack power when weapon stat requirements are not met.

Fields.Name: Insufficient Stats Stamina Consumption Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to stamina consumption when weapon stat requirements are not met.

Fields.Name: Insufficient Stats Guard Break Power
Fields.Description: Guard break power used when weapon stat requirements are not met.

Fields.Name: Shield Scaling Maximum Stat Value
Fields.Description: Maximum stat value considered when calculating shield scaling bonuses.

Fields.Name: Multiplayer Inherited Lord of Cinder Special Effect 1
Fields.Description: Special effect applied in multiplayer if the player is a Lord of Cinder and the state is inherited based on multiplayer role or summon type. Applied only once upon initial activation.

Fields.Name: Multiplayer Inherited Lord of Cinder Special Effect 2
Fields.Description: Special effect applied in multiplayer if the player is a Lord of Cinder and the state is inherited based on multiplayer role or summon type. Applied only once upon initial activation.

Fields.Name: Multiplayer Inherited Lord of Cinder Special Effect 3
Fields.Description: Special effect applied in multiplayer if the player is a Lord of Cinder and the state is inherited based on multiplayer role or summon type. Applied only once upon initial activation.

Fields.Name: Multiplayer Inherited Lord of Cinder Special Effect 4
Fields.Description: Special effect applied in multiplayer if the player is a Lord of Cinder and the state is inherited based on multiplayer role or summon type. Applied only once upon initial activation.

Fields.Name: Multiplayer Inherited Lord of Cinder Special Effect 5
Fields.Description: Special effect applied in multiplayer if the player is a Lord of Cinder and the state is inherited based on multiplayer role or summon type. Applied only once upon initial activation.

Fields.Name: Maximum Negative Stamina
Fields.Description: Maximum amount of negative stamina that can be accumulated.

Fields.Name: Wet Material Override Blend Time
Fields.Description: Interpolation time used when transitioning between overlapping wet material states.

Fields.Name: Multiplayer Client Estus Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to a client's Estus Flask count in multiplayer. For example, 0.5 halves the number of flasks.

Fields.Name: Seed of a Giant Tree Base Drop Chance
Fields.Description: Base probability, in percent, of obtaining a Seed of a Giant Tree after being invaded.

Fields.Name: Seed of a Giant Tree Bonus Drop Chance
Fields.Description: Bonus probability, in percent, of obtaining a Seed of a Giant Tree after being invaded.

Fields.Name: Kick Input Angle
Fields.Description: Maximum angle from the player's forward direction within which a kick input is accepted.

Fields.Name: NPC Player Analog Weight Ratio - Light
Fields.Description: Analog movement weight ratio, in percent, used by NPC players while in the light equip load category.

Fields.Name: NPC Player Analog Weight Ratio - Medium
Fields.Description: Analog movement weight ratio, in percent, used by NPC players while in the medium equip load category.

Fields.Name: NPC Player Analog Weight Ratio - Heavy
Fields.Description: Analog movement weight ratio, in percent, used by NPC players while in the heavy equip load category.

Fields.Name: NPC Player Analog Weight Ratio - Overloaded
Fields.Description: Analog movement weight ratio, in percent, used by NPC players while overloaded.

Fields.Name: NPC Player Analog Weight Ratio - Very Light
Fields.Description: Analog movement weight ratio, in percent, used by NPC players while in the very light equip load category.

Fields.Name: Seed of a Giant Tree Invader Special Effect ID
Fields.Description: Special effect ID applied to invading dark spirits when the Seed of a Giant Tree is active.

Fields.Name: NG+ Scaling Base Special Effect ID
Fields.Description: Base special effect ID used to apply New Game cycle scaling bonuses.

Fields.Name: Arrow/Bolt Model ID Offset
Fields.Description: Offset added to the equipped slot 1 arrow or bolt model ID when displaying the projectile model.

Fields.Name: Arrow/Bolt Remaining Model Mask Threshold 1
Fields.Description: First percentage threshold used to determine the visible arrow or bolt model based on the remaining ammunition count.

Fields.Name: Arrow/Bolt Remaining Model Mask Threshold 2
Fields.Description: Second percentage threshold used to determine the visible arrow or bolt model based on the remaining ammunition count.

Fields.Name: Reserved
Fields.Description: Reserved. Purpose unknown.

Fields.Name: Player Poison Resistance Recovery
Fields.Description: Rate, in points per second, at which the player's poison buildup naturally decreases.

Fields.Name: Player Toxic Resistance Recovery
Fields.Description: Rate, in points per second, at which the player's toxic buildup naturally decreases.

Fields.Name: Player Bleed Resistance Recovery
Fields.Description: Rate, in points per second, at which the player's bleed buildup naturally decreases.

Fields.Name: Player Curse Resistance Recovery
Fields.Description: Rate, in points per second, at which the player's curse buildup naturally decreases.

Fields.Name: Player Frost Resistance Recovery
Fields.Description: Rate, in points per second, at which the player's frost buildup naturally decreases.

Fields.Name: Enemy Poison Resistance Recovery
Fields.Description: Rate, in points per second, at which an enemy's poison buildup naturally decreases.

Fields.Name: Enemy Toxic Resistance Recovery
Fields.Description: Rate, in points per second, at which an enemy's toxic buildup naturally decreases.

Fields.Name: Enemy Bleed Resistance Recovery
Fields.Description: Rate, in points per second, at which an enemy's bleed buildup naturally decreases.

Fields.Name: Enemy Curse Resistance Recovery
Fields.Description: Rate, in points per second, at which an enemy's curse buildup naturally decreases.

Fields.Name: Enemy Frost Resistance Recovery
Fields.Description: Rate, in points per second, at which an enemy's frost buildup naturally decreases.

Fields.Name: Critical Health Threshold
Fields.Description: If the player's current HP is at or below this value, they enter the critical health state.

Fields.Name: System Lord of Cinder Special Effect ID
Fields.Description: Special effect ID invoked by the game system when transforming the player into a Lord of Cinder.

Fields.Name: Arena Duel Client Estus Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to a multiplayer client's Estus Flask count during Arena Duel matches.

Fields.Name: Arena Duel Client Estus Offset
Fields.Description: Flat offset applied to a multiplayer client's Estus Flask count during Arena Duel matches.

Fields.Name: Arena Brawl Client Estus Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to a multiplayer client's Estus Flask count during Arena Brawl matches.

Fields.Name: Arena Brawl Client Estus Offset
Fields.Description: Flat offset applied to a multiplayer client's Estus Flask count during Arena Brawl matches.

Fields.Name: Arena Team Client Estus Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to a multiplayer client's Estus Flask count during Arena Team matches.

Fields.Name: Arena Team Client Estus Offset
Fields.Description: Flat offset applied to a multiplayer client's Estus Flask count during Arena Team matches.

Fields.Name: Spear of the Church HP Estus Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to HP Estus Flask allocation for the Spear of the Church (Yellow Monk) boss role.

Fields.Name: Spear of the Church HP Estus Offset
Fields.Description: Flat offset applied to HP Estus Flask allocation for the Spear of the Church (Yellow Monk) boss role.

Fields.Name: Spear of the Church FP Estus Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to FP Estus Flask allocation for the Spear of the Church (Yellow Monk) boss role.

Fields.Name: Spear of the Church FP Estus Offset
Fields.Description: Flat offset applied to FP Estus Flask allocation for the Spear of the Church (Yellow Monk) boss role.
